blockedAssertions.blockedBy: The executed specs did not run the full A/B/C public-relay bootstrap workflow from create/distribute/onboard through approvals required by this assertion.
The executed specs did not directly assert B-initiated sign with A approval-history/UI correlation semantics required by this assertion.

rotate-keyset-live-sign.spec.ts validated key rotate + sign-success/old-share-failure, but did not directly assert the full cross-contract flow details (B-initiated sign with approval UI/event-log/indexeddb checks) required by VAL-CROSS-008.
Insufficient direct evidence for the dev-server/HMR-specific contract clauses from the prescribed command list.
All executed specs targeted local relay ws://127.0.0.1:8194 and did not validate primal-only public relay readiness/sign completion path.
None of the executed specs attempted reusing an already-consumed onboarding token in a fresh browser profile.
Available run evidence is partial relative to the full VAL-CROSS-019 behavioral contract.
The required chained meta flow (001→002→003→015→016) was not executed as one continuous scripted session by the assigned command set.
Insufficient direct Back-button flow evidence in the mandated command set.
Warning-whitelist clause not directly evidenced by the recorded transcript output.
Insufficient direct evidence from the requested command set for keyboard activation/focus-ring behavior.
Insufficient direct evidence for the QR scannability clause from the specified runs.
The executed specs did not directly capture per-relay publish/OK frame evidence for configured relay fan-out.
The executed specs did not directly assert source dashboard peer-list row rendering/persistence for the newly onboarded member.
The executed specs did not directly assert Settings > Group Profile threshold text/date UI behavior required by this assertion.
The executed harnesses used local ws://127.0.0.1:8194 relay and did not run the public-relay + camera-injection flow required by this assertion.
No direct Paper parity artifact (comparison/screenshot diff) in the specified runs.
None of the executed specs attempted over-capacity onboarding (exhausted share slots) and resulting error handling.
Insufficient direct evidence for end-to-end keyboard cancellation semantics.
Insufficient direct evidence for focus-traversal clauses.
Insufficient direct evidence for all clauses of VAL-ONBOARD-025 from the requested command set.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance: shell-cli section covering shell gate evidence requirements and VAL-CROSS-029/030 checks.

dedupedBlockers.rootCause: Insufficient direct evidence for full public-relay multi-device bootstrap chain assertions.
Onboard sponsor UI/manual interaction clauses not fully covered by current automated harness (focus restoration, tab traversal, post-copy interaction continuity, full QR decode loop).
Some cross-route/browser-manual clauses were not directly executed in this round (dev-server HMR deep-link continuity, Back-button continuity, per-route warning-whitelist accounting).
